recipes.trigger: Logs, metrics, traces, alerts, or launch monitoring may contain sensitive data

steps.when: collection purpose, minimization, redaction, retention, and access are defined
telemetry crosses a new trust or external-service boundary

recipes.trigger: A product or service change is approaching production

steps.when: a performance target or regression risk exists
the change crosses a security boundary

recipes.authorization: Every merge, push, release, deploy, data migration, or rollback remains separately authorized.

recipes.trigger: An API, dependency, feature, or data contract is replaced or retired
